'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 111''' is the one hundred eleventh issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[April 9]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[Unholy Alliance!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[Unholy Alliance!]]"
*"Heroes of the galaxy: Monark Starstalker Part 1"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 21: The Omni-Computer!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: We search the stars!"
